classes.reasoning: Document explicitly titled 'Studiemateriale – Kartleggingsverktøy' (Study Material – Mapping/Assessment Tools) and contains standardized patient-facing questionnaires including MMSE-NR3, MoCA, C-SSRS, and FLAME Battery designed to collect symptom and cognitive data from participants.

summary: This document is a collection of patient questionnaires and assessment tools for the PATH-1 clinical trial studying dementia. It contains standardized cognitive and psychiatric screening instruments (Clinical Dementia Assessment, MMSE-NR3, MoCA, C-SSRS, FLAME Battery) to be administered at screening, baseline, and follow-up visits. These tools measure cognitive function, suicide risk, and memory performance in study participants.
